sqlMap.select:
select count(*) from( SELECT personnelid,importance FROM e_keypersonnel_t WHERE validflag > 0
cdtid = #cdtid#
workinfoid = #workinfoid#
GROUP BY personnelid) A LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p on A.personnelid=p.id LEFT JOIN p_wen_grade_t w on w.personnelid=p.id where p.validflag>0 and w.validflag>0
p.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
p.personname like '%$personname$%'
p.houseplace like '%$houseplace$%'
p.homeplace like '%$homeplace$%'
order by importance desc

select A.id,A.personnelid,A.deal,A.importance,p.cardnumber,p.personname,p.houseplace,p.homeplace,p.sexes,p.nation,p.marrystatus,p.education,p.politicalposition, p.faith,p.persontype,w.id as wenid,r.telnumber from( SELECT id,personnelid,deal,importance FROM e_keypersonnel_t WHERE validflag > 0
cdtid = $cdtid$
workinfoid = $workinfoid$
GROUP BY personnelid) A LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p on A.personnelid=p.id LEFT JOIN p_wen_grade_t w on w.personnelid=p.id LEFT JOIN p_relation_t r on r.personnelid=p.id and r.validflag>0 where p.validflag>0 and w.validflag>0
p.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
p.personname like '%$personname$%'
p.houseplace like '%$houseplace$%'
p.homeplace like '%$homeplace$%'
order by importance desc
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO e_keypersonnel_t (cdtid,personnelid,validflag,addoperatorid,addoperator,addtime,memo,workinfoid,deal) VALUES ($cdtid$,$personnelid$,$validflag$,$addoperatorid$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$',$workinfoid$,'$deal$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE e_keypersonnel_t SET validflag = 0,updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select:
select count(*) from e_keypersonnel_t where validflag>0 and cdtid=$cdtid$
personnelid = $personnelid$
sqlMap.update: UPDATE e_keypersonnel_t SET workinfoid = #workinfoid# WHERE personnelid = #personnelid#
sqlMap.select:
select count(*) from( SELECT personnelid FROM e_keypersonnel_t WHERE validflag > 0
cdtid = #cdtid#
workinfoid = #workinfoid#
GROUP BY personnelid) A LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p on A.personnelid=p.id where p.validflag>0
p.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
p.personname like '%$personname$%'
p.houseplace like '%$houseplace$%'
p.homeplace like '%$homeplace$%'

select A.id,A.personnelid,A.deal,p.cardnumber,p.personname,p.houseplace,p.homeplace,p.sexes,p.nation,p.marrystatus,p.education,p.politicalposition, p.faith,p.persontype,r.telnumber from( SELECT id,personnelid,deal FROM e_keypersonnel_t WHERE validflag > 0
cdtid = $cdtid$
workinfoid = $workinfoid$
GROUP BY personnelid) A LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p on A.personnelid=p.id LEFT JOIN p_relation_t r on r.personnelid=p.id and r.validflag>0 where p.validflag>0
p.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
p.personname like '%$personname$%'
p.houseplace like '%$houseplace$%'
p.homeplace like '%$homeplace$%'

select count(*) from( SELECT personnelid FROM zfw_e_keypersonnel_t WHERE validflag > 0
cdtid = #cdtid#
workinfoid = #workinfoid#
GROUP BY personnelid) A LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p on A.personnelid=p.id LEFT JOIN p_wen_grade_t w on w.personnelid=p.id where p.validflag>0 and w.validflag>0

select A.id,A.personnelid,A.deal,p.cardnumber,p.personname,p.houseplace,p.homeplace,p.sexes,p.nation,p.marrystatus,p.education,p.politicalposition, p.faith,p.persontype,w.id as wenid,r.telnumber,A.validflag from( SELECT id,personnelid,deal,validflag FROM zfw_e_keypersonnel_t WHERE validflag > 0
cdtid = $cdtid$
workinfoid = $workinfoid$
GROUP BY personnelid) A LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p on A.personnelid=p.id LEFT JOIN p_wen_grade_t w on w.personnelid=p.id LEFT JOIN p_relation_t r on r.personnelid=p.id and r.validflag>0 where p.validflag>0 and w.validflag>0
select A.*,p.cardnumber from zfw_e_keypersonnel_t A LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p on A.personnelid=p.id where A.validflag>0 and A.id = $id$
sqlMap.update: UPDATE zfw_e_keypersonnel_t SET validflag = $validflag$ WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE e_keypersonnel_t SET importance = #importance# WHERE id = #id#
